extraction_status: ✅ 已从 Markdown 教材提取

methods.name: 两列对照例题法
methods.description: 所有例题采用两列格式：左列是文字解释步骤，右列是对应的数学运算。模拟教师在黑板上边讲边写的过程，帮助学生将自然语言思维与数学符号操作建立一一对应。
methods.example: 左列：'将两个点坐标代入斜率公式' → 右列：'m = (y₂-y₁)/(x₂-x₁) = (1-(-2))/(8-3) = 3/5'
methods.source_evidence: Prealgebra 2e Preface: 'Most examples are written in a two-column format, with explanation on the left and math on the right to mimic the way that instructors talk through examples as they write on the board in class.'
methods.page_reference: Prealgebra Preface p.13; College Algebra Preface p.xiv

methods.name: 例题-即练循环
methods.description: 每个 Example 后紧跟一道 'Try It' 练习，让学生在刚学完例题后立即尝试求解类似问题。通过即时反馈巩固理解，避免学生被动阅读。
methods.example: Example 1.1: '下列哪些是计数数？哪些是整数？' → Try It 1.1: '下列哪些是计数数？哪些是整数？' （同类型、不同数字）
methods.source_evidence: Prealgebra 2e: 'A Try It exercise immediately follows an Example, providing the student with an immediate opportunity to solve a similar problem.' College Algebra: 'Examples are followed by a Try It question.'

methods.name: 步骤清单法 (How To)
methods.description: 在例题之前，提供一个编号步骤列表，明确解决该类问题所需的每个步骤。建立解题模板，降低认知负荷。
methods.example: How To: 用文字读出整数 → Step 1: 从最左边的数字开始，读出每个周期中的数字及周期名 → Step 2: 用逗号分隔各周期
methods.source_evidence: Prealgebra 2e: 'A How To is a list of steps necessary to solve a certain type of problem. A How To typically precedes an Example.'

methods.name: 真实情境引入法
methods.description: 每个章节以一个真实世界的情境开头（如磁悬浮列车、手机套餐、潜水员压力），引发学生的好奇心和关联感，然后自然过渡到数学建模。
methods.example: College Algebra Ch4: 上海磁悬浮列车以83m/s匀速行驶，初始距站250m → 引出 D(t) = 83t + 250 一次函数模型
methods.source_evidence: College Algebra Ch4 opening: 'the Shanghai MagLev Train carries passengers for a 30-kilometer trip from the airport to the subway station in only eight minutes... How can we analyze the train's distance from the station as a function of time?'

methods.name: 函数多表征法（词、符号、表、图）
methods.description: 线性函数同时用四种表征方式呈现：文字描述（Word Form）、函数记号（Function Notation）、表格（Tabular Form）、图像（Graphical Form）。帮助学生在不同表征间灵活转换。
methods.example: 磁悬浮列车问题：Word='距离是时间的函数' → Notation=D(t)=83t+250 → Table=t:0→D:250, t:1→D:333... → Graph=直线
methods.source_evidence: College Algebra: 'There are several ways to represent a linear function, including word form, function notation, tabular form, and graphical form.'

methods.name: 操作数学活动
methods.description: 使用实物操作（方块积木、分数圆盘、数轴）帮助学生建立具体-抽象的桥梁。在引入抽象概念前先用操作建立直觉。
methods.example: Manipulative Mathematics: 'Doing the Manipulative Mathematics activity Number Line-Part 1 will help you develop a better understanding of the counting numbers and the whole numbers.'
methods.source_evidence: Prealgebra 2e: 方块积木 (blocks) 用于建模整数位值；分数圆和分数条 (Fraction circles and bars) 用于使分数具体化。

methods.name: 三段式例题法（问题-解法-分析）
methods.description: College Algebra 的例题采用三段式结构：Question 提出问题 → Solution 演示步骤 → Analysis 反思更广泛的含义。Analysis 部分帮助学生从'怎么做'提升到'为什么这样做'。
methods.example: Example: 潜水员压力函数 P(d)=0.434d+14.696 → Solution: 用文字重述函数 → Analysis: '初始值14.696是水面PSI，斜率0.434表示每深1英尺增加0.434PSI'
methods.source_evidence: College Algebra Preface: 'The question clearly lays out a mathematical problem to solve. The Solution walks through the steps. Finally, the Analysis reflects on the broader implications of the Solution just shown.'

methods.name: 语言-数学翻译表
methods.description: 提供常见文字表述与数学运算的对照翻译表，帮助学生系统地将应用题中的自然语言转化为数学表达式。
methods.example: 'One number exceeds another by a' → x, x+a; 'Twice a number' → 2x; 'The product of a number and a, decreased by b' → ax-b
methods.source_evidence: College Algebra §2.3 Table 1: verbal expressions and their equivalent mathematical expressions

methods.name: 五步建模法
methods.description: 将真实世界问题建模为方程的五个步骤：1. 识别已知量 → 2. 用变量表示未知量 → 3. 建立第二个未知量与第一个的关系 → 4. 列方程 → 5. 解方程并用文字表述结果
methods.example: 手机套餐问题：已知=$0.10/mi + $50/day → x=里程数 → C=0.10x+50 → 代入求解 → '行驶300英里，日租$80'
methods.source_evidence: College Algebra §2.3 How To: 'Given a real-world problem, model a linear equation to fit it. 1. Identify known quantities. 2. Assign a variable... 3. Find a way to write the second unknown in terms of the first. 4. Write an equation. 5. Solve the equation.'

methods.name: Q&A 误区预防法
methods.description: 在叙述中插入 'Q & A' 部分，预先解答学生常见的 yes/no 误区问题，防止概念混淆。
methods.example: Q: '斜率的单位是否总是输出/输入的比？' A: '是的。可以理解为每单位输入变化的输出变化量，如 miles/hour 或 dollars/day。'
methods.source_evidence: College Algebra Preface: 'A Q&A may appear at any point in the narrative. This feature pre-empts misconceptions by posing a commonly asked yes/no question, followed by a detailed answer and explanation.'
methods.page_reference: College Algebra Preface p.xiv, Ch4 p.299

methods.name: 协作统计实验
methods.description: 统计课在每章末设置 Statistics Labs，学生亲自设计实验、收集数据、分析结果。从真实数据采集开始，学习统计推断。
methods.example: Statistics Lab: 学生调查学校中课外活动参与数量，用不同抽样方法（分层、系统、整群、便利）收集数据，对比结果差异。
methods.source_evidence: HS Statistics: 'Statistics Labs allow students to design, implement, and interpret statistical analyses. They are drawn from actual experiments and data-gathering processes and offer a unique hands-on and collaborative experience.'

methods.name: 小步递进法
methods.description: 将复杂概念拆分为一系列小步骤呈现，每步只引入一个新概念。特别适合基础薄弱的学生建立信心。
methods.example: 分数学习路径：可视化分数(4.1) → 分数乘除(4.2) → 带分数乘除(4.3) → 同分母加减(4.4) → 异分母加减(4.5) → 带分数加减(4.6) → 分数方程(4.7)
methods.source_evidence: Prealgebra 2e Preface: 'The beginning, in particular, is presented as a sequence of small steps so that students gain confidence in their ability to succeed in the course.'

methods.name: 斜率即变化率
methods.description: 将斜率的教学从纯粹的几何概念（rise/run）扩展到'变化率'的广义理解。通过多个真实场景（距离/时间、短信/天、压力/深度）让学生理解斜率的实际意义。
methods.example: 斜率 = Δy/Δx = change in output / change in input。单位可以是 meters/second、PSI/foot、texts/day。m>0递增, m<0递减, m=0常数。
methods.source_evidence: College Algebra §4.1: 'The slope determines if the function is an increasing linear function, a decreasing linear function, or a constant function.' Example 2 uses texts/day scenario.

methods.name: 图像变换法（平移-缩放）
methods.description: 通过基础函数 y=x² 的变换来理解二次函数：h 控制水平平移，k 控制垂直平移，a 控制开口方向和宽窄。从最简图形出发逐步变换。
methods.example: y=x² → y=(x+2)²-3: 向左移2 → 向下移3; a=1/2使图像更宽; a=-3使图像倒转且更窄
methods.source_evidence: College Algebra §5.1: 'The standard form is useful for determining how the graph is transformed from the graph of y=x². If k>0, the graph shifts upward... If h>0, the graph shifts toward the right...'

methods.name: 日常数学连接
methods.description: 每章练习中设置 'Everyday Math' 专区，使用学生日常生活中遇到的情境（购物折扣、销售税、利息、小费计算）来练习当章概念。
methods.example: 百分比章节：计算销售税、佣金、简单利息；小数章节：超市单价比较、GPA计算；几何章节：房间面积估算
methods.source_evidence: Prealgebra 2e: 'Applications are drawn from many everyday experiences... Everyday Math highlights practical situations using the math concepts from that particular section.'

methods.name: 手机套餐对比建模
methods.description: 使用两家手机公司的不同套餐作为线性方程建模的经典案例，涵盖：建立模型、代入计算、比较方案、求解等价点。
methods.example: Company A: $34+$0.05/min vs Company B: $40+$0.04/min → A=0.05x+34, B=0.04x+40 → 1160min时B更划算（$86.4 vs $92），420min时A更划算（$55 vs $56.8），600min时两者相等
methods.source_evidence: College Algebra §2.3 Example 2: Two cell phone companies with different packages, comparing monthly costs at different usage levels.
